author: Charlie
text:
# 😂 Funny & Iconic Moments from the Chats
*A lovingly curated collection of the most unhinged, chaotic, and iconic things said*

---

## 🏆 HALL OF FAME — All-Time Iconic Lines

> **Leon:** *"I hope the evil witch of north america puts a curse on your bloodline"*
> **Leon:** *"I hope your whole city gets driven into a famine"*
> **Leon:** *"I hope you get jumped by tupac at the gates of hell"*
> **Leon:** *"I hope you sneeze out a metal rod and it destroys your organs in the process"*
> **Emma:** *"I hope a cannibal kidnaps you and then when you wake kills himself and then months later find out that you've contracted a blood-borne disease"*
> **Leon:** *"I hope you get given a free labubu"* ← the most devastating one

Leon and Emma's cursing competition at Charlie at 1am. Absolute cinema.

---

> **Leon:** *"Horniness got no effect on me I got an effect on Horniness"*

Leon announcing this while trying to resist gooning. Philosopher king behaviour.

---

> **Leon:** *"I was a monster addict then. And I quit 2023."*

Said with the same gravity as a reformed criminal.

---

> **Ruby:** *"Hang upside down like a bat and it might trigger the hair follicles to produce more hair. I'm not a hairstylist but it could work."*

Giving medical advice with complete confidence.

---

> **Charlie:** *"What's the downside to eating a clock? It's time consuming."*
> **Ruby:** *"BAGAHAHHAHHAHAH stfu"*
> **Leon:** *"I can hear the violence in her thoughts"*

---

> **Mohammed:** *"I'm mohammadsexual"*

No further context needed.

---

> **Coral:** *"What the jellyfish bro"*
> *(autocorrect for "hell")*
> **Coral:** *"Idk why it went to jellyfish"*

---

> **Leon:** *"I should be a poet. Call me Homer cuz im a simping— I mean. Simpson."*

---

> **Josephy:** *"That sentence feels like it's translated from English to Russian to English again"*

In response to Charlie trying to communicate.

---

> **Charlie:** *"HOW CAN ONE PERSON BE IN THERE FOR 2 HOURS"*

Waiting for someone to finish in the bathroom. Screaming in capitals at midnight.

---

## 🎭 THE GROUP NAME SAGA (04/11/2025)

In the span of one evening, the group was named:
1. **"Wild group"**
2. **"The pfp is leng"** ← Pam's doing
3. **"The pfp is annoying"** ← Leon's revenge
4. **"Charlie is a faggot"** ← Leon escalating
5. **"Pam is leng"** ← Pam's counter
6. **"Leon is gay"** ← Leon sabotaging himself
7. **"Pam is goonable"** ← Pam retaliates
8. **"Leon is slightly attracted to males but won't admit it unless its through group names."** ← Leon's magnum opus group name
9. **"Pam and leon is goonable"** ← peaceful resolution
10. **"Big group bruh"** ← giving up

---

## 🥊 GREATEST ARGUMENTS

### The Wrestling Debate
Mohammed declared wrestling was "a sex fest invented so gay men could blend into straight culture." Emma spent 45 minutes defending it with facts about barbed wire, blood loss, and Brock Lesnar's UFC career. Josephy concluded: *"If you want to see a cool real fight just tell two homeless people to fight for some crack. 96% success rate."*

### The Pansexual Egg Incident
Leon asked if pansexual meant you like pans. Mohammed genuinely wanted to know the logistics of having sex with an egg. This went on for several minutes. Coral eventually had to explain what pansexual actually means while both of them were ignoring her.

### Leon vs Matilda (ongoing, entire chat)
Leon: *"I hope ruby breaks up with you"*
Leon: *"Nobody likes u mat"*
Leon: *"Goodnight to everyone. Except matilda. Frick matilda. She's so mean to me."*
...and they were dating.

---

## 💀 MOST UNHINGED INDIVIDUAL MOMENTS

**Charlie** trying to get Meta AI to say a slur backwards. It replied in Dutch at one point because Leon accidentally typed German. Charlie's response: *"Why did it change languages"*

---

**Leon**, coming down from spice at midnight:
> *"Holy shit why did i actually get a tempting urge to goon to myself when I was little. Wouldn't that be tuff tho. I think it would be pedophilia in a way tho."*
> **Charlie:** *"And just inhumane"*
> **Leon:** *"Thats kinda why I wanna do it tho"*

---

**Emma**, completely unprompted at 3am:
> *"MY WIFE JUST RAN OUT AND THEN GOT ATTACKED BY A GINGER. AT LEAST SHE'S IRISH."*

(She was playing Sims)

---

**Lloyd**, setting his hand on fire with cologne:
> **Emma:** *"DID HE FUCKING LIGHT HIS HAND ON FIRE"*
> **Lloyd:** *"Want me to do it again so you can see"*
> **Emma:** *"Sure"*
> *(he does it again)*
> **Emile:** *"Bro said cutting myself is too basic let's set me on fire"*

---

**Josephy**, out of nowhere:
> *"Life size Charlie getting pegged by Joseph"* (as a Minecraft build suggestion)
> **Charlie:** *"You what"*
> **Josephy:** *"You heard me"*
> **Josephy:** *"Proudly"*

---

**Mohammed** after someone was sympathetic about his cats dying:
> *"why are you being sympathetic fuck you"*

---

**Ruby**, after eating 8 slices of pizza:
> Ruby challenges Mohammed to a fight.
> They agree on time and place.
> Ruby immediately: *"guys stop the violence. this isn't like you. let's be nice to each other."*
> Mohammed: *"too late you triggered me"*
> Ruby: *"i hate u. im gonna fly over to your house and flip your bed upside down"*

---

**Leon**, hiding weed in his shoebox:
> *"My room stinks of weed. I hid it in my shoebox."*
> **Matilda:** *"Oh really now"*
> **Leon:** *"Yeah. Really. You told me I could do it one last time."*
> **Matilda:** *"Hurry up with your one last time then."*

Matilda running the tightest operation.

---

**Emma** finding out her Sims downloaded adult mods:
> *"I downloaded a shit ton of mods on sims 4 I fear it may crash"*
> Later: *"WHY ARE ALL MY SIMS DRUNK"*
> Later: *"ONE OF THEM BECAME GINGER WITH DREADLOCKS WHAT THE FUCK"*
> Later: *"I'M GONNA CRY WHY IS AEW SO FREAKY"*

---

## 😭 ACCIDENTALLY ICONIC

**Leon**, sending "mb" (my bad) too early:
> *"I did NOT suck on Ruby's tits*"
> **Ruby:** *"You WHAT"*
> **Leon:** *"I did NOT suck on Ruby's tits\*"*
> **Leon:** *"shit i sent too early"*

---

**Charlie**, texting his mum by accident:
> *"I just sent my mother a message saying 'Steve's not making it gng'. I CANT DELETE IT"*

---

**Ruby**, reviewing her own birth:
> *"My mums talking about how I wasn't a mistake which is really stupid because who tf chooses to have a kid when they're in their early twenties"*
> **Emile:** *"I swear you are born nine months after your dads birthday…"*
> **Sargun:** *"He might have enjoyed his birthday too much"*

---

**Elias**, mid-conversation:
> *"icl ts pmo sm n sb rn ngl, r u srsly srs n fr rn vro? Smh lol atp js go 💔... b fr vro, idek nm, brb gng gtg atm lmao, bt ts pmo 2 js lmk lol onb fr"*

Nobody responded.

---

## 🐾 MINI THE DOG — A Recurring Character

Charlie appears obsessed with Leon's dog Mini to an almost alarming degree:
> *"I've only stared at her through a window, intensely"*
> *"Can I kirkify Minnie"*
> *"She's been held hostage"*

Leon: *"Get my dog's name out your fucking mouth"*
Josephy: *"I'm going to put mini in my mouth. I wonder how much of her would fit."*

---

## 🎬 JOSEPH'S GREATEST HITS

> *"Literally shut your bitch ass up"* — then immediately *"I'm joking pookie"*

> *"Never say that again or I will cut your hands off"* — *"Like they do in your country when you steal. Because you stole my happiness by saying that."*

> *"I could punch someone much easier than sprint around them with a ball and tackle them"* — during the wrestling debate

> After Ruby said *"I'm so wet and sticky right now"* (about her jeans):
> Josephy: *"'I'm so wet and sticky right now' -Ruby"*
> **Matilda:** *"consent still doesn't exist to joseph"*

---

## 🏅 HONOURABLE MENTIONS

- **Autumn**, completely casually: *"Am I the only one who lowkey wants a school shooting to happen"* — immediately followed by — *"Gulp"*

- **Leon**, on his sister: *"She made a video pretending to be Kira and wrote on her notes app: Nigel Farage, orange man and L. It was really funny. Then she took a potato chip. And ATE IT."*

- **Mohammed**: *"I sleep with three eyes open. Because I can."* / Ruby: *"You have two eyes. You're a liar."* / Mohammed: *"I have six."*

- **Emma**, texting 200 tongue emojis 😛 in a row when asked about something uncomfortable.

- **Coral**'s autocorrect turning *"thrust"* into *"thrust"* mid-argument. Everyone noticed. Nobody let it go.

- **Charlie**: *"I might go bald to spice stuff up a bit. Big regret but it would make stuff funny."*

- **Leon**, after being accused of sucking on Ruby's tits in school: *"I refuse to speak without my attorney present"*

- **Ruby**, discovering she has no passport: *"I don't. I'm very legal. I have a birth certificate that means I'm legal."* Mohammed: *"hah Ruby is an illegal"*

- The entire poll: **"Kick Ruby"** with options: Yes / Possibly / Perchance / Maybe — and Coral going *"you can't just say perchance"*

---

## 📊 CHARACTER SUMMARY

| Person | Their Thing |
|--------|-------------|
| **Leon** | Writes 40-curse-curse walls at 2am, retracts them, does it again |
| **Charlie** | Broken autocorrect, bowling IKEA candles, staring at Mini through glass |
| **Ruby** | Gives weird medical advice, licks people's fingers, threatens to flip beds |
| **Emma** | Never sleeps, goes to hospital every other week, extremely passionate about wrestling |
| **Matilda** | Running Leon's entire life like a compliance officer |
| **Josephy** | Says something deeply wrong, then says "proudly" |
| **Mohammed** | In Saudi Arabia, somehow always online, philosopher |
| **Coral** | Giggling at everything, jellyfish autocorrect, chaotic admin energy |
| **Elias/Alias** | Sends unreadable abbreviation walls, loves Gurren Lagann |
| **Emile/Email** | Chaotic, keeps getting kicked |

---

*"This group chat is genuinely a gold mine and I love you all"* — probably nobody said this but it's true
